justification: The diff successfully upgrades Spring Boot 2.2 to 3.3 and Java 8 to 21, replacing deprecated Springfox with springdoc-openapi and migrating javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet. However, it introduces unnecessary churn in MavenWrapperDownloader.java (wildcard imports to explicit imports) and adds explicit JUnit Jupiter dependency which is already managed by the starter. The migration is functional but lacks Java 21 idioms (records, pattern matching, etc.) and includes some redundant changes.
